title: Backrooms PBR / Poolrooms PBR
description: A backrooms resource pack that mainly aims to replicate the original essence picture of the backrooms
body:
**have you wanted an accurate representation of the backrooms in minecraft? ,are you tired of using bamboo as your backrooms walls?, well say no more!, this resource pack allows you to experience the backrooms in all of its glory in pbr.
made by Professional**

Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Yjv3Zg3xt8) for more info + a Minecraft Server to build!

# **You can find the backrooms blocks with the tag "backrooms"**
![You can find the backrooms blocks with the tag "backrooms"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0839c59a1519a5cc7d2a2662e5346f70f7f40b20.png)
- 
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f9902fba93213bbaea353317bd4f1f7103151a8.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2e36c8b5f4a0461f6577be1052100522cfd248b.png)

Recommended shaders are: SUES PTGI E12, VTXS

contact me on discord for feedback or any questions!: pro_fessional
